title: Campanula hongii
taxonomy: Campanula hongii is classified within the Campanulaceae family, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as bellflowers. This plant is a member of the Campanula genus, which contains over 300 species. Campanula hongii is a specific species within this genus, native to the Himalayan region. Its classification also places it within the Campanuloideae subfamily, which is a subgroup of the Campanulaceae family. By understanding its classification, we can gain insights into the plant's evolutionary history and relationships with other species.
